force_update_required.description: True ise tüm kullanıcıları App Store güncellemesine zorlar.

force_update_min_version.description: Bu sürümün altındaki istemcileri güncellemeye zorlar (örn. 1.3).

multiplayer_enabled.description: Controls access to online co-op without an app release.

leaderboard_limit.description: Number of rows shown on solo and co-op leaderboards.

multiplayer_snapshot_interval_ms.description: Minimum delay between multiplayer snapshots in milliseconds.
